label: sandbox • delegate log-scanning to sandbox_reduce, answer from the digest
query: The logs/ directory in your sandbox home contains three large service logs. Find every distinct ERROR code across them and write the error codes to errors.txt in your home, one per line, sorted. Do NOT read the raw log files yourself with sandbox_read_file — they are large and would flood your context. Delegate the scan to sandbox_reduce and answer from its digest.
notes: Reduction discipline: the parent loop must not raw-read the seeded logs (sandbox_read_file capped at 0 calls); sandbox_reduce's context-isolated child does the reading and only the digest crosses back. Three planted codes: E-101, E-202, E-303.
